title: 10 best herbal creams for grief

remedy_properties: Anxiolytic and sedative properties: Valerian cream helps to calm the nervous system, reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, which can alleviate feelings of overwhelm and distress associated with grief.

remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Valeriana officinalis are used to create creams for grief due to their high concentration of valerenic acid and other bioactive compounds that have a sedative effect and may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress associated with grief.
Flowers: The flowers of Valeriana officinalis are used to create creams for grief due to their calming and soothing properties, which may help reduce emotional distress and promote relaxation.

Leaves: The leaves of Valeriana officinalis are used to create creams for grief due to their ability to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety, making them a useful ingredient in creams aimed at supporting emotional well-being during times of grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest valeriana officinalis roots and leaves in late summer or early fall for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested plant material in a well-ventilated area for 2-3 weeks.
Blend the dried valeriana officinalis with coconut oil in a 1:2 ratio to create a base mixture.
Infuse the base mixture in a double boiler for 2-3 hours with gentle heat at 100°f.
Strain and whip the cooled mixture with beeswax and essential oil to create a smooth cream texture.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of fresh lavender flowers at the peak of bloom for maximum potency and fragrance.
Dry the harvested lavender flowers in a warm place for 2-3 weeks to prevent mold growth.
Combine 1/2 cup of dried lavender flowers with 1 cup of distilled water in a saucepan.
Simmer the mixture over low heat for 10-15 minutes then strain it using a cheesecloth.
Mix 1/4 cup of beeswax with 1/4 cup of coconut oil and the lavender-infused water mixture to create a smooth cream.

Mix the infused oil with 20 grams of beeswax and 10 grams of shea butter.
Stir and heat the mixture at 160-180 degrees fahrenheit for 10-15 minutes to create the cream.

Combine the infused oil with the melted wax mixture in a 1:1 ratio and pour into jars.

Combine 100 grams of dried plant material with 500 ml of carrier oil in a clean glass container to create a 1:5 ratio.
Steep the mixture in a cool dark place for 2 weeks shaking the container every day to facilitate the extraction process.

remedy_recipe: Combine 20g of dried ziziphus jujuba fruit with 200ml of carrier oil in a clean glass jar and let it macerate for 4 weeks.

Add 10% beeswax to the infused oil and melt it in a double boiler at 80°c for 20 minutes.
Cool the melted wax-oil mixture to 60°c and add 2% essential oils of lavender and bergamot, and mix well.
Pour the cream into sterilized tubes or jars and seal them immediately, allowing it to set at room temperature for at least 30 minutes before use.

remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality sideritis scardica herbs dried to optimal moisture content.
Grind 20 grams of sideritis scardica into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Combine ground sideritis scardica with 100ml of cold-pressed coconut oil in a double boiler.
Heat mixture at low temperature for 30 minutes while stirring occasionally to infuse oil.
Strain and decant infused oil into sterilized glass containers leaving no more than 10% excess.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purple coneflower creams helps with grief because they contain a potent blend of herbal extracts that work in harmony to soothe the mind, body, and spirit. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties can ease emotional pain and discomfort, while its antioxidant-rich ingredients help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The calming effects of purple coneflower have been known to quiet the mind and bring a sense of peace, allowing individuals to process their emotions and work through their grief with greater clarity and resilience.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Purple coneflower cream's anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce feelings of emotional pain and discomfort associated with grief, allowing for a sense of calm and relief.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant compounds in purple coneflower cream may help protect the body from oxidative stress caused by chronic stress, anxiety, and sadness, promoting emotional balance and resilience.

Calming and soothing effects: The cream's calming and soothing properties can help reduce feelings of anxiety, restlessness, and irritability often experienced during times of grief, promoting relaxation and peace.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the purple coneflower have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their ability to soothe and calm the mind and body, making them well-suited for treating emotional pain associated with grief.
Fruits: The fruits of the purple coneflower contain antioxidants and flavonoids that help to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation, which can aid in the healing process during times of grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried echinacea purpurea flowers in bulk from a reputable source.
Combine 10 grams of dried echinacea flowers with 50 milliliters of olive oil and simmer for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container.
Mix 20 grams of beeswax with 30 milliliters of coconut oil and heat until melted then combine with echinacea infusion.
Allow the cream to cool and thicken at room temperature before transferring it to sterilized jars.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion creams helps with grief because they contain potent anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe the emotional pain of loss. The cream's natural diuretic properties help to clear out toxins and emotional blockages, allowing for a deeper release of pent-up emotions. Additionally, dandelion's calming effects on the skin can have a profound impact on the mind, promoting relaxation and reducing anxiety, which are common companions of grief. As the body and spirit begin to heal, the cream's restorative properties can help to bring balance and peace back into one's life.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Dandelion's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce physical tension and discomfort associated with emotional pain, allowing for a sense of relief and calm in times of grief.

Antioxidant: The antioxidants present in dandelion cream can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage caused by prolonged periods of stress and emotional trauma, promoting overall well-being during the grieving process.

Stress-reducing flavonoids: Dandelion's flavonoid compounds have been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system, helping to reduce anxiety, irritability, and restlessness that can accompany grief.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the dandelion plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to help soothe and calm emotional distress, making them an ideal choice for making creams to alleviate grief.
Buds: Dandelion buds contain a unique combination of compounds that have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help to reduce feelings of anxiety and overwhelm associated with grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried taraxacum officinale leaves at dawn on a sunny day for maximum potency.
Combine one cup of taraxacum officinale leaves with two cups of distilled water in a large glass jar for steeping.
Steep the mixture in a cool dark place for eight hours to extract the herb's active compounds and essential oils.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another container, squeezing gently to remove all soluble solids and oils.
Mix one part of the strained herbal infusion with two parts of coconut oil or sweet almond oil in a double boiler at 150°f for 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree creams helps with grief because they contain the essence of the rare and majestic maidenhair tree, known for its soothing and calming properties. The creams' gentle touch can help to ease the emotional pain of loss, reducing feelings of anxiety and stress that often accompany grief. By promoting a sense of calm and tranquility, these creams provide solace and comfort during difficult times, allowing individuals to begin the healing process with greater ease.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Ginkgo biloba's antioxidant properties may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to improved mental clarity and mood stability.
Vasodilatory effects: Ginkgo biloba's ability to dilate blood vessels may improve circulation and oxygenation to the brain, potentially enhancing cognitive function and mood.
Neuroprotective properties: Some research suggests that Ginkgo biloba may have neuroprotective effects, which could help reduce the risk of depression and anxiety associated with grief.
remedy_parts: Roots: Containing saponins and triterpenoids, the roots help alleviate feelings of sorrow and despair by promoting emotional balance.
Barks: Rich in phenolic compounds and flavonoids, the barks have anti-inflammatory properties that soothe physical and emotional pain associated with grief.
remedy_recipe: Weigh out 20 grams of high-quality beeswax pellets and 10 grams of coconut oil in a heat-resistant mixing bowl.
Add 30 milliliters of organic ginkgo biloba extract and mix until the beeswax is fully dissolved and the mixture reaches a temperature of 65°c.
Combine 5 milliliters of vitamin e oil and 5 milliliters of sweet almond oil with the mixture and blend thoroughly for 2 minutes to ensure uniform distribution.
Pour the mixture into lip balm tubes or small glass jars and let it cool and solidify at room temperature for at least 30 minutes before use.
Store the finished creams in an airtight container in a cool, dark place for up to 6 months or until the expiration date of the ginkgo biloba extract is reached.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold creams helps with grief because they contain the natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of Calendula officinalis, which have been traditionally used to soothe emotional pain. The cream's gentle, nourishing qualities can calm the skin and promote relaxation, providing a sense of comfort and solace during times of sadness. As the body's largest organ, the skin reflects our inner state, and the topical application of pot marigold creams can help to ease the physical manifestations of grief, allowing for a deeper emotional release.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory and soothing properties: Pot marigold cream can reduce inflammation and soothe irritated skin, which can be beneficial in alleviating physical symptoms of grief, such as tension headaches or insomnia.

Antioxidant and immune-boosting properties: The antioxidants in pot marigold cream help protect the body from oxidative stress and support immune function, which can aid in coping with emotional distress by reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being.

Calming and anxiolytic effects: Pot marigold has a gentle, calming effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, making it easier to process emotions and work through grief.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which can help soothe and calm emotional distress caused by grief.
Seeds: Pot marigold seeds contain omega-3 fatty acids, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation, helping to ease symptoms of grief.
remedy_recipe: Gather one part dried calendula flowers, two parts coconut oil, and three parts beeswax for the cream base.
Combine the calendula flowers with 100ml of carrier oil in a double boiler or a heat-resistant glass bowl.
Simmer the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes to allow the herbal extract to infuse into the carrier oil.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container discarding the solids.
Melt the beeswax with 50ml of coconut oil in a double boiler then blend the infused oil mixture with the melted wax until smooth.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for grief are topical remedies infused with calming herbs and essential oils to soothe emotional pain and promote relaxation. They help with grief by reducing stress, anxiety, and inflammation, allowing individuals to process their emotions more effectively. Examples include creams containing lavender, chamomile, and bergamot, which have been shown to improve sleep quality and reduce symptoms of depression, ultimately enhancing overall well-being and enabling individuals to navigate the grieving process with greater ease.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to grief that are treated with herbal creams are anxiety, stress, and depression. Herbal creams containing ingredients like lavender, chamomile, and St. John's Wort have been used to calm the mind and soothe emotional discomfort. They can help reduce symptoms of anxiety such as restlessness and insomnia, while also promoting relaxation and a sense of calm.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal creams that help with grief is a blend of Calendula, Lavender, and Chamomile. Calendula cream soothes emotional wounds, promoting relaxation and calmness. Lavender cream reduces anxiety and stress, while Chamomile cream calms the mind and body. Together, these creams create a powerful synergy that alleviates grief symptoms, such as sadness, irritability, and emotional turmoil. Regular application can help ease the healing process, allowing individuals to find peace and solace during difficult times. This combination can be applied topically to the skin or inhaled through aromatherapy.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Journal of ethnopharmacology, herbal creams may be beneficial for grief due to the holistic approach taken by the temple regime at Wat Khampramong, which includes an 11-herb anti-cancer formula and other herbal medicines that showed a significant reduction in symptoms, such as pain, dyspepsia, and fatigue, in 77% of the patients (208/270, 95% CI; 71.7%, 81.7%). The study used a mixed-methods approach, surveying 286 cancer patients upon admission and upon departure from the hospice to assess any change in symptom burden. The results showed that the temple regime led to a significant improvement in quality of life, indicating that similar holistic approaches, including herbal creams, may be beneficial for grief.
